custom_events.name: Sponsor Gift
custom_events.description: A tribute receives a gift from their sponsor
narrative_templates: A parachute drifts down from the sky, carrying a gift from {tribute}'s sponsor back in the Capitol.
{tribute} receives a much-needed gift from their sponsor, a reminder that someone still cares about their survival.
The distinctive whistle of a sponsor gift parachute catches {tribute}'s attention, bringing hope in this dark time.

custom_events.name: Gamemaker Announcement
custom_events.description: The Gamemakers announce a rule change or event
narrative_templates: The voice of Claudius Templesmith booms through the arena, announcing an important change to the rules.
The Gamemakers interrupt the Games with an announcement that could change everything for the remaining tributes.
A holographic projection appears in the sky, displaying a message from the Gamemakers that alters the course of the Games.

custom_events.name: Feast Announcement
custom_events.description: The Gamemakers announce a feast at the Cornucopia
narrative_templates: The Gamemakers announce a feast at the Cornucopia, promising supplies that could mean the difference between life and death.
A deadly temptation is offered as the Gamemakers declare that essential supplies will be available at the Cornucopia.
The arena falls silent as the announcement of a feast echoes through the speakers, guaranteeing bloodshed.

custom_events.name: Mutant Attack
narrative_templates: Horrific mutations engineered by the Capitol emerge from the wilderness, their twisted forms hunting the tributes.
{tribute} encounters one of the Gamemakers' most terrible creations, a being that should not exist in nature.
The arena reveals its true horror as genetically engineered monstrosities attack the remaining tributes.

custom_events.name: Alliance Formation
narrative_templates: {tribute1} and {tribute2} form a tentative alliance, combining their strengths for mutual survival.
In this deadly game, {tribute1} and {tribute2} decide that cooperation might be their best chance.
Two tributes who might have been enemies elsewhere find common ground in their shared struggle for survival.
